Decision (2026-03-17):

- All AI model deployments must go through the existing change-management process.
- pgAudit will be used for SOX compliance on all Borg database tables (chosen because pgAudit is natively supported on Azure PostgreSQL Flexible Server and meets the SOX audit requirements).
